# ISKRA

> Dubai-based WhatsApp Outreach agency. We build predictable pipelines of qualified replies and booked calls using dedicated infrastructure, proven copy, and full-funnel tracking. WhatsApp Outreach is our core service; AI Agent is a secondary offering.

## Pages

- [Home](https://iskra.ae/): Overview of ISKRA's WhatsApp Outreach service, results, and process.
- [WhatsApp Outreach](https://iskra.ae/whatsapp-outreach): Core service - cold WhatsApp campaigns, Database Reactivation, and lead generation for B2B and high-ticket B2C in Dubai and the UAE.
- [AI Agent](https://iskra.ae/ai-agent): Secondary service - AI-powered conversation handling layered on top of WhatsApp Outreach.
- [Case Studies](https://iskra.ae/case-studies): Real client results across medspa, real estate, coaching, and other verticals.
- [About](https://iskra.ae/about): Team, founder, and how the agency operates.
- [Contact](https://iskra.ae/contact): Book a discovery call or reach the team.

## What we do

- WhatsApp cold outreach with dedicated sender infrastructure
- Database Reactivation campaigns to existing CRM contacts
- Pipedrive CRM integration as the primary CRM
- AI Agent layer for handling inbound replies at scale
- Custom pricing tied to performance, not seats

## Location

Dubai, UAE (GST / UTC+4). Serving clients globally with a focus on the UAE and GCC.
